modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to link new department email to Zoom account

full_description_text: 
I have new email for department, it is assigned to me. I try to link this email to Zoom but it not work. I am not sure what steps to take next, and I need help to connect this email properly.
